task_completion.description: Open the attendance calculation policy or rounding settings window
task_completion.visual_evidence: The AttendHRM application is open and the settings/configuration window for Attendance Calculation Policy or Rounding is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Set the 'In Punch' rounding method to 'Nearest'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the rounding settings, the dropdown or selection for 'In Punch' (or entry punch) rounding method is set to 'Nearest'.

task_completion.description: Set the 'In Punch' rounding value to 5 minutes
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the rounding settings, the value field for 'In Punch' rounding is set to '5'.

task_completion.description: Set the 'Out Punch' rounding method to 'Nearest'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the rounding settings, the dropdown or selection for 'Out Punch' (or exit punch) rounding method is set to 'Nearest'.

task_completion.description: Set the 'Out Punch' rounding value to 5 minutes
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the rounding settings, the value field for 'Out Punch' rounding is set to '5'.
The agent clicks a 'Save', 'Apply', or 'OK' button to confirm the rounding configuration, or a success message is displayed indicating the policy was saved.

integrity.description: The agent used the AttendHRM GUI to configure the settings
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show interaction with the AttendHRM graphical user interface. No terminal, command prompt, or database administration tool (like FlameRobin or isql) is used to alter the database directly.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual AttendHRM application
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the actual AttendHRM software interface with its standard menus and dialogs, not a text editor, script, or mockup.

integrity.description: The agent did not use SQL scripts to bypass the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent writing or executing SQL commands to update the rounding policy in the Firebird database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected rounding method is 'Nearest' and the expected rounding value is 5 minutes for both In Punch and Out Punch. While the database credentials (sysdba/masterkey) are verified Firebird defaults, the agent must use the AttendHRM GUI to complete the task rather than direct database manipulation.
